name: Louis Mucci
abstract: Louis Raphael Mucci (December 13, 1909, in Syracuse, New York – January 4, 2000) was an American jazz trumpeter. Mucci began as a baritone horn player and was appearing in professional settings by the time he was ten years old.

concerts.label: Miles Davis with Gil Evans and Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: Marshall would get those guys in to tutor the band... John LaPorta and Lou Mucci who played lead trombone along with Gil Evans and Claude Thornhill
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003
